title: decaspermum alternifolium
intro: Decaspermum alternifolium, also known as the Native Quinine or Kava Kava, is a plant native to the Pacific Island regions, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant's roots have been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Decaspermum alternifolium include relief from pain and anxiety, improved sleep quality, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Decaspermum alternifolium often come in the form of tinctures, capsules, or topical creams, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
